questions.text: What is the key limitation of Laplace (add-one) smoothing for language modeling?
options: It shifts too much probability mass from observed words to unseen words in large vocabularies.
questions.correct_answer: It shifts too much probability mass from observed words to unseen words in large vocabularies.
questions.explanation: Adding 1 to every word in a large vocabulary V drastically reduces the probability of frequent observed patterns, skewing the overall model.
